title: How to watch Samsung's July 2026 Galaxy Unpacked event - Engadget
summary: The company is expected to announce new foldables and smartwatches. Samsung is also expected to announce the Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 at Unpacked.
